name: Twenty To Scratch
address: 5508 W Pinnacle Pointe Dr B, Rogers, AR 72758
about:
Twenty to Scratch is a private, 24/7-access indoor golf facility designed for serious players and passionate golfers. The venue offers two GC Hawk simulator bays, a PuttView 7+ AR putting green, and a dedicated putting studio equipped with SAM PuttLab, providing a premium space to play, practice, and unwind on a flexible schedule. It features a private teaching bay with Foresight and Swing Catalyst technology for customized instruction and comprehensive club, putter, and ball fitting services.

The facility is led by NCAA and PGA Tour coach Barrett Lais and partners with Diamond Training Fitness to offer TPI-based fitness training aimed at improving mobility, power, and swing efficiency. Twenty to Scratch emphasizes a professional, high-tech environment ideal for focused practice and skill development, with membership options that prioritize convenience and access for dedicated golfers.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium technology including GC Hawk simulators and SAM PuttLab
Comprehensive services from lessons to club fitting and fitness training

simulator_hardware.notes: 2 simulator bays available for play and practice

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own clubs, though club rentals may be available upon request.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverages) privileges are allowed, and the venue is catering-friendly for events.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18-hole simulator sessions typically take 1-2 hours, depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Twenty to Scratch is kid-friendly and offers junior programs and coaching, making it suitable for young golfers.
